CREATE TABLE env_vars (var_name VARCHAR, var_value VARCHAR);
SELECT var_value FROM env_vars WHERE var_name = 'HOME';
SELECT var_value FROM env_vars WHERE var_name IN (SELECT var_name FROM env_vars WHERE var_value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE env_check (var_name VARCHAR, var_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO env_check SELECT var_name, getenv(var_name) FROM env_vars;
SELECT ec.var_name, ec.var_value FROM env_check ec JOIN env_vars ev ON ec.var_name = ev.var_name WHERE ec.var_value IS NOT NULL;
WITH env AS (SELECT var_name, getenv(var_name) AS value FROM env_vars) SELECT * FROM env WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_vars; CREATE TABLE temp_vars AS SELECT var_name, getenv(var_name) AS value FROM env_vars;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_vars WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT ev.var_name, ev.var_value FROM env_vars ev LEFT JOIN temp_vars tv ON ev.var_name = tv.var_name WHERE tv.var_name IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE combined AS SELECT ev.var_name, ev.var_value FROM env_vars ev UNION SELECT ec.var_name, ec.var_value FROM env_check ec;
SELECT var_name, COUNT(*) FROM combined GROUP BY var_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
